jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - React
jobs.description: Work with a talented team on innovative software solutions, focusing on front-end architecture and high-performance UI components.
requirements: 3+ years experience in a senior role
Experience with state management libraries like Redux or Zustand

jobs.title: Frontend Developer (React Native)
jobs.description: Develop and maintain cross-platform mobile applications using React Native. Collaborate with design and backend teams to deliver new features.
requirements: Published applications on App Store or Google Play

jobs.title: Software Engineer IV - Backend
jobs.description: Design, develop, and maintain high-performance backend services. Work on scalable systems within the Engineering, Product, and IT departments.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in backend development
Strong knowledge of Node.js, PHP, or Java
Expertise in RESTful API design and microservices

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer - AWS
jobs.description: Design and manage reliable, scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS. Lead automation efforts and optimize deployment pipelines.
requirements: 3+ years of DevOps experience with AWS
Experience with CI/CD tools like Jenkins or GitHub Actions

jobs.title: Senior Data Engineer
jobs.description: Build and maintain data pipelines for analytics and reporting. Work on large datasets to support business intelligence initiatives.

jobs.title: Senior SQA Engineer
jobs.description: Develop and maintain automated test frameworks for enterprise software solutions. Lead quality assurance efforts and mentor junior team members.
requirements: Proficiency in Java or Python scripting

jobs.title: UX Designer
jobs.description: Create intuitive user experiences for mobile gaming applications. Work with a passionate team of designers and developers.
requirements: Understanding of Material Design and iOS Human Interface Guidelines

jobs.title: Backend Developer (Node.js)
jobs.description: Develop and maintain server-side logic for e-commerce platforms. Focus on performance, scalability, and security.
requirements: Experience with Express.js or similar frameworks
Knowledge of database systems (e.g., MongoDB, PostgreSQL)
Familiarity with cloud services like AWS or Azure

jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.description: Develop ML models for demand forecasting and route optimization. Work on our logistics platform to improve efficiency and customer experience.
requirements: PhD/MS in Data Science or a related field

jobs.title: Technical Writer
jobs.description: Create clear and concise developer documentation for API products and SDKs. Collaborate with engineers to ensure accuracy.

jobs.title: Full Stack Software Developer
jobs.description: Develop and maintain both front-end and back-end components of web applications. Work on various projects with a focus on delivering robust solutions.
requirements: Strong knowledge of MERN stack or similar technologies
Experience with database design and API development

jobs.title: Frontend Developer (MERN Stack)
jobs.description: Seeking a talented MERN stack developer to build responsive web interfaces. You will be responsible for creating high-performance, bug-free code.
requirements: Proficiency in React.js, Node.js, and Express.js
Ability to work in an Agile environment

jobs.title: WordPress Website Developer - Bricks Expert
jobs.description: Create high-quality, responsive websites using WordPress and Bricks Builder. Optimize sites for performance and security.
requirements: Expertise in WordPress and Bricks Builder
Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Experience with site optimization and security best practices

jobs.title: Senior .NET Engineer
jobs.description: Lead technical initiatives and mentor teams in a fast-growing U.S.-based tech company. Work with modern .NET frameworks and cloud technologies.
requirements: Expertise in Azure and CI/CD pipelines
Proficiency with front-end frameworks (Angular or React)

jobs.title: Cloud Core Network Service Engineer
jobs.description: Deliver and support NFV-based core network projects. Handle equipment deployment, network upgrades, and integration of 4G/5G elements.
requirements: 3+ years of experience in telecom core networks
Knowledge of NFV architecture and technologies

jobs.title: Mobile Technician / Service Engineer
jobs.description: Provide technical support and service for mobile devices. Diagnose and repair hardware and software issues.
requirements: 2+ years of experience as a mobile technician
Knowledge of smartphone hardware and software

jobs.title: Digital Marketing Expert
jobs.description: Manage and execute digital marketing campaigns, including SEO, SEM, social media, and email marketing. Analyze campaign performance.
requirements: Proficiency with Google Analytics and SEO tools
Strong understanding of social media platforms
Ability to create compelling marketing content

jobs.title: Content Writer
jobs.description: Create engaging and informative content for websites, blogs, and marketing materials. Research industry-related topics and trends.
requirements: Strong command of the English language

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Lead the development of complex front-end applications. Collaborate with global teams and contribute to architectural decisions.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in frontend development
Expertise in React or other modern frameworks
Strong knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript
Experience with performance optimization and testing

jobs.title: Principal Software Engineer - C++
jobs.description: Lead the design and development of high-performance C++ applications. Solve complex technical challenges and mentor junior engineers.
requirements: Expertise in data structures and algorithms

jobs.title: QA Engineer (Night-Shift)
jobs.description: Perform manual and automated testing of software products. Work with a remote team during night-shift hours.
requirements: Experience with test case design and execution
Ability to work during night-shift hours

jobs.title: Senior Project Manager
jobs.description: Oversee project delivery, manage resources, and ensure operational efficiency. Lead cross-functional teams and drive project success.
requirements: Expertise in Agile and Waterfall methodologies
Strong leadership and stakeholder management skills

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - Java
jobs.description: Design and maintain high-quality Java applications. Implement best practices and optimize performance.
requirements: Knowledge of database systems and SQL

jobs.title: Technical Recruiter
jobs.description: Source, screen, and recruit technical talent. Collaborate with hiring managers to understand technical requirements.
requirements: Strong knowledge of the tech industry and job roles
